ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the device is located */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the device (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  "last_online" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the device was online */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last software update */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last communication with the device */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., Wi-Fi, Ethernet) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the device */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES device_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the site */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device type (e.g., Sensor, Actuator) */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Average power consumption of the device type */,
  "data_rate" REAL /* Average data rate of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the state (e.g., Green for Online, Red for Offline) */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level associated with the state (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_polling" (
  "polling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being polled */,
  "poll_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the polling event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State of the device at the time of polling */,
  "poll_interval" INTEGER /* Interval in seconds between polling events */,
  "poll_status" TEXT /* Status of the polling event (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_polling_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_polling_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES device_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, configure, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the log entry pertains to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event or error */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event or error */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., Info, Error, Warning) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., Device, System) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software after the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Firmware, Software) */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the metric pertains to */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Performance, Health) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Device, Sensor) */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., Normal, Abnormal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the alert pertains to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Error, Warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User ID who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Daily, Monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Generated, Pending) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User ID who generated the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role-permission association (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user-role association (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
